mapper.insert: INSERT INTO reviews (movieid, userid, content, score, parent_id, createdat) VALUES (#{movieId}, #{userId}, #{content}, #{score}, #{parentId}, #{createdAt})
mapper.select: SELECT r.reviewid, r.movieid, m.title, r.userid, u.username, r.content, r.score, r.parent_id, r.like_count, r.createdat FROM reviews r JOIN movies m ON r.movieid = m.movieid JOIN users u ON r.userid = u.userid WHERE r.reviewid = #{reviewId}

SELECT r.reviewid, r.movieid, m.title, r.userid, u.username, r.content, r.score, r.createdat FROM reviews r JOIN movies m ON r.movieid = m.movieid JOIN users u ON r.userid = u.userid WHERE r.movieid = #{movieId} order by r.createdat desc
select * from reviews order by createdat desc

SELECT r.reviewid, r.movieid, m.title, r.userid, u.username, r.content, r.score, r.createdat FROM reviews r JOIN movies m ON r.movieid = m.movieid JOIN users u ON r.userid = u.userid WHERE r.userid = #{userId} AND r.parent_id IS NULL
mapper.update: UPDATE reviews SET movieid = #{movieId}, userid = #{userId}, content = #{content}, score = #{score}, createdat = #{createdAt} WHERE reviewid = #{reviewId}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM reviews WHERE parent_id IS NULL

SELECT r.reviewid, r.movieid, r.userid, r.content, r.score, r.parent_id, r.like_count, r.createdat, u.username, u.avatar, u.nickname FROM reviews r JOIN users u ON r.userid = u.userid WHERE r.parent_id = #{parentId} ORDER BY r.createdat ASC

SELECT r.reviewid, r.movieid, m.title, r.userid, u.username, r.content, r.score, r.parent_id, r.like_count, r.createdat, u.avatar, u.nickname FROM reviews r JOIN movies m ON r.movieid = m.movieid JOIN users u ON r.userid = u.userid WHERE r.movieid = #{movieId} AND r.parent_id IS NULL ORDER BY r.createdat DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM review_likes WHERE review_id = #{reviewId} AND user_id = #{userId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO review_likes (review_id, user_id, created_at) VALUES (#{reviewId}, #{userId}, NOW())
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM review_likes WHERE review_id = #{reviewId} AND user_id = #{userId}
mapper.update: UPDATE reviews SET like_count = COALESCE(like_count, 0) + 1 WHERE reviewid = #{reviewId}
UPDATE reviews SET like_count = COALESCE(like_count, 0) - 1 WHERE reviewid = #{reviewId}
